commands:
sudo bash -lc 'set -e
cd /opt/innercircle/backend
if grep -q ^IVS_REGION= .env; then sed -i "s|^IVS_REGION=.*|IVS_REGION=ap-south-1|" .env; else echo "IVS_REGION=ap-south-1" >> .env; fi
if grep -q ^IVS_CHANNEL_ARN= .env; then sed -i "s|^IVS_CHANNEL_ARN=.*|IVS_CHANNEL_ARN=arn:aws:ivs:ap-south-1:203433203309:channel/0hRn3GvF42Q1|" .env; else echo "IVS_CHANNEL_ARN=arn:aws:ivs:ap-south-1:203433203309:channel/0hRn3GvF42Q1" >> .env; fi
if grep -q ^IVS_INGEST_ENDPOINT= .env; then sed -i "s|^IVS_INGEST_ENDPOINT=.*|IVS_INGEST_ENDPOINT=418d1168fcd1.global-contribute.live-video.net|" .env; else echo "IVS_INGEST_ENDPOINT=418d1168fcd1.global-contribute.live-video.net" >> .env; fi
if grep -q ^IVS_PLAYBACK_URL= .env; then sed -i "s|^IVS_PLAYBACK_URL=.*|IVS_PLAYBACK_URL=https://418d1168fcd1.ap-south-1.playback.live-video.net/api/video/v1/ap-south-1.203433203309.channel.0hRn3GvF42Q1.m3u8|" .env; else echo "IVS_PLAYBACK_URL=https://418d1168fcd1.ap-south-1.playback.live-video.net/api/video/v1/ap-south-1.203433203309.channel.0hRn3GvF42Q1.m3u8" >> .env; fi
if grep -q ^IVS_STREAM_KEY_ARN= .env; then sed -i "s|^IVS_STREAM_KEY_ARN=.*|IVS_STREAM_KEY_ARN=arn:aws:ivs:ap-south-1:203433203309:stream-key/9wQg6wAyWzal|" .env; else echo "IVS_STREAM_KEY_ARN=arn:aws:ivs:ap-south-1:203433203309:stream-key/9wQg6wAyWzal" >> .env; fi
if grep -q ^IVS_STREAM_KEY_VALUE= .env; then sed -i "s|^IVS_STREAM_KEY_VALUE=.*|IVS_STREAM_KEY_VALUE=sk_ap-south-1_9wQg6wAyWzal_tS3ZVi8HQVcDxnR2FHOpob6PHuVSoS|" .env; else echo "IVS_STREAM_KEY_VALUE=sk_ap-south-1_9wQg6wAyWzal_tS3ZVi8HQVcDxnR2FHOpob6PHuVSoS" >> .env; fi
sudo systemctl restart innercircle-backend'
